portfolio_thesis: BTC and ETH remain the core risk-on exposure for the day.
portfolio_invalidation: If macro risk rises sharply or BTC loses structure, rebuild the book.
flip_triggers: Flip to defensive short bias only if BTC loses higher-timeframe structure together with a clear macro risk-off shift; flip back long only after structure reclaims and macro stress eases.
change_summary: Keep BTC as the primary anchor with ETH held as a secondary watch.

scheduled_rechecks.reason: Recheck whether ETF flow and funding still support the current gross exposure.
